nodes.label: Static class variables that are specified by the rules of the game
Initialize 3D coordinates of all elements of the soccer pitch.         :param pi
Samples each pitch element every dist meters, returns a dictionary associating t
For lines belonging to the pitch lawn plane returns its 2D homogenous equation c
